raw_candidates.label: AI Compliance Evidence Copilot
raw_candidates.description: Collects recurring audit artifacts, maps controls, and prepares evidence packets for compliance reviews.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: control mapping, evidence collection, and audit packet assembly
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: improving repeated compliance evidence operations across audits
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: collect artifacts, map controls, prepare evidence packet, learn from auditor gaps
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Repeated enterprise pain exists around turning scattered operational artifacts into reusable compliance evidence.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: The repeated loop is evidence readiness across multiple audits and reviews.

raw_candidates.label: Audit Readiness Coordinator
raw_candidates.description: Prepares recurring audit-ready evidence packets from scattered company artifacts.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: audit packet assembly and control evidence coordination
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: improving recurring audit readiness across cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: collect artifacts, assemble audit packet, answer auditor gaps, improve next packet
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Alias view of the same recurring compliance evidence domain.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Repeated audit readiness workflow, same core evidence operations domain.

raw_candidates.label: AI Security Questionnaire Copilot
raw_candidates.description: Helps teams answer repeated security questionnaires with reusable evidence, control mapping, and answer updates.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: security answer drafting, evidence retrieval, and procurement response packaging
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: improving repeated questionnaire response accuracy and speed
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: retrieve prior answers, update evidence, submit questionnaire, learn from follow-up requests
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Repeated enterprise sales friction appears around security review loops, especially where answers must be maintained across deals.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: This is a repeated enterprise response loop with its own evidence surface.

raw_candidates.label: AI RFP Response Copilot
raw_candidates.description: Helps B2B teams assemble, tailor, and learn from repeated RFP and security questionnaire responses.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: response drafting, knowledge retrieval, and enterprise packaging
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: improving repeated enterprise response accuracy and speed
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: retrieve evidence, draft response, submit package, learn from procurement feedback
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Repeated demand appears around high-friction enterprise response loops, especially where teams reuse prior answers.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: This is a recurring enterprise operating loop rather than one-off document generation.

raw_candidates.label: AI Investor Update Copilot
raw_candidates.description: Helps founders turn weekly operating data into recurring investor updates and board-ready narratives.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: founder update drafting, board prep, and operating narrative packaging
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: getting better at recurring investor communication and company storytelling
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: collect metrics, draft update, review stakeholder feedback, refine next update
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Founders repeatedly struggle to convert raw company data into high-trust investor communication.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: This is not generic writing help; it is a recurring founder operating loop.

raw_candidates.label: Board Narrative Copilot
raw_candidates.description: Turns company metrics and operating notes into recurring board narratives and investor-facing updates.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: board packet narrative assembly and investor communication packaging
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: improving recurring board communication quality across cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: gather metrics, draft board narrative, send update, learn from board questions
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Alias framing of the same recurring founder update domain.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Repeated board communication workflow, same domain shape as investor updates.

raw_candidates.label: AI Partner Prospecting Copilot
raw_candidates.description: Helps teams find, brief, and sequence outreach to recurring integration and distribution partners.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: partner research, qualification, and outreach planning
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: getting better at repeated partner development loops
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: research partner, draft outreach brief, run conversations, refine partner thesis
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Teams repeatedly treat partnership development like scattered spreadsheet work instead of a compounding operating loop.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: This is a recurring partner-development workflow with clear specialization.

raw_candidates.label: AI Sales Call Prep Copilot
raw_candidates.description: Prepares account context, risks, objections, and next-step plans before recurring sales calls.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: deal-context assembly and pre-call sales preparation
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: getting better at repeated high-stakes sales preparation
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: collect account context, draft prep brief, run call, learn from outcome
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Revenue teams want recurring prep workflows around live calls, not just generic CRM note generation.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: The durable loop is pre-call preparation plus post-call learning.

raw_candidates.label: AI Renewal Risk Briefing Copilot
raw_candidates.description: Builds recurring renewal-risk briefs from usage, support, and stakeholder signals before customer success reviews.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: renewal-risk synthesis and account review preparation
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: improving repeated renewal intervention quality over account cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: collect account signals, draft renewal brief, run review, refine intervention playbook
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Customer teams repeatedly need a compounding risk-readout loop before renewals, not just static dashboards.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: This is a repeated account-risk preparation domain.

raw_candidates.label: Shared Answer Library
raw_candidates.description: A shared place to store prior enterprise answers used by the team.
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Useful feature area but still mostly a library pattern rather than a full operating domain.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Workflow or feature bucket rather than a specialized chip.

raw_candidates.label: Enterprise Buyers
raw_candidates.description: People inside companies evaluating vendor purchases.
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Real audience segment but not a repeated operating domain by itself.
